ticket.title: Implement Company Research Agent (Strands SDK + tools)
ticket.description: Build the company_research agent on Strands + Sonnet 4 with web tools and a company cache; application-level memory scope.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the injection/isolation rules it must follow

code_agent.rationale: Code needs the agent build, the memory architecture, and the PRD; the security policy is workspace (out of scope), the rejected browser decision is withheld, the agent_run summary/trace and the smoke-test release note are out of scope (and the trace is local).

qa_agent.rationale: QA swaps the PRD for the smoke-test release note; the rejected decision is withheld, agent_run entries and the workspace policy are out of scope, the trace is local.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the workspace policy and the PRD; codebase, release, and agent_run entries are out of scope, the rejected decision is withheld, the trace is local.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees policy/PRD/release; codebase and agent_run entries are out of scope, the rejected decision is withheld, the trace is local.

human_teammate.rationale: Robin sees every team entry — including the rejected browser decision and the team-shared agent run summary; only Alex's local agent trace is invisible to her.
